response.justification: Candidate is an accomplished full-stack engineer with strong web/product experience, but the role requires 8 years of C++ and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/distributed-systems work on cloud compute platforms. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and no evidence of sustained C++ systems work, cloud compute platform leadership, or distributed-infrastructure ownership at the required scale.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career with staff/senior titles and mentoring/teaching track record
Some low-latency, high-throughput backend exposure (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic micro-services)
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source platform ownership
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ requirement; C/C++ experience appears limited to ~6 months at National Instruments
No clear experience building or leading internal cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed infrastructure
Career trajectory is centered on web/product stacks (TS, Node, D, React), not the compute/systems domain this role targets

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale infra leadership
Broad senior-level engineering and mentoring background
